news.title:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.

news.title:
Sunil Bharti Mittal to retire as Airtel Africa chair in July 2026; Gopal Vittal named successor.
Shares of Bharti Airtel rose 2.2% to ₹1,841.1 on NSE amid leadership transition news.
news.summary:
Sunil Bharti Mittal to retire as Airtel Africa chair in July 2026; Gopal Vittal named successor.
Shares of Bharti Airtel rose 2.2% to ₹1,841.1 on NSE amid leadership transition news.

news.title:
India VIX dropped to 24.5, signaling reduced market anxiety; Nifty 50 rose 2.3% to 23,444.75, and Sensex gained 2.2%.
Softened crude oil prices eased inflation concerns; HDFC Bank, Reliance, Bharti Airtel led Nifty 50 gains, with midcaps outperforming.
news.summary:
India VIX dropped to 24.5, signaling reduced market anxiety; Nifty 50 rose 2.3% to 23,444.75, and Sensex gained 2.2%.
Softened crude oil prices eased inflation concerns; HDFC Bank, Reliance, Bharti Airtel led Nifty 50 gains, with midcaps outperforming.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 83 crore.
The trade involved 454,439 shares at Rs. 1826.50 per share.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 83 crore.
The trade involved 454,439 shares at Rs. 1826.50 per share.

news.title:
HDFC Bank led a ₹1 tn market cap erosion among top 5 firms; Sensex dipped 0.04%.
Reliance Industries gained ₹45.9k cr, while Bharti Airtel, SBI, LIC, Infosys also rose.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank led a ₹1 tn market cap erosion among top 5 firms; Sensex dipped 0.04%.
Reliance Industries gained ₹45.9k cr, while Bharti Airtel, SBI, LIC, Infosys also rose.

news.title:
Telecom tariff hike delayed to December; Jio & Airtel lead Jan 2026 subscriber additions.
Airtel dominates M2M subscriber market; Jio leads in 5G fixed wireless with 70% share.
news.summary:
Telecom tariff hike delayed to December; Jio & Airtel lead Jan 2026 subscriber additions.
Airtel dominates M2M subscriber market; Jio leads in 5G fixed wireless with 70% share.

news.title:
Airtel and Jio gained users in January as telecom growth slowed.
Vi's user losses reduced during the same period, as per TRAI.
news.summary:
Airtel and Jio gained users in January as telecom growth slowed.
Vi's user losses reduced during the same period, as per TRAI.

news.title:
CLSA upgrades Bharti Hexacom to 'Hold' with a target price of Rs 1,510.
CLSA prefers Bharti Airtel over Hexacom due to valuation, growth lag, and footprint.
news.summary:
CLSA upgrades Bharti Hexacom to 'Hold' with a target price of Rs 1,510.
CLSA prefers Bharti Airtel over Hexacom due to valuation, growth lag, and footprint.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel converted 391.18M partly paid shares into fully paid shares after receiving ₹156,959.8M from shareholders.
Paid-up capital now ₹30,467.8M; 1.11M partly paid shares remain, with reminders to be issued.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel converted 391.18M partly paid shares into fully paid shares after receiving ₹156,959.8M from shareholders.
Paid-up capital now ₹30,467.8M; 1.11M partly paid shares remain, with reminders to be issued.

news.title:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.
news.summary:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.

news.title:
DoT issued Rs. 2.02 crore penalty to Bharti Airtel for subscriber verification violations.
Violation identified in Jan 2026 audit; Airtel will pay penalty without contesting.
news.summary:
DoT issued Rs. 2.02 crore penalty to Bharti Airtel for subscriber verification violations.
Violation identified in Jan 2026 audit; Airtel will pay penalty without contesting.

news.title:
Jefferies reiterates Buy on Bharti Airtel with ₹2,250 TP despite revenue/EBITDA cut by 6–8%.
Concerns include Jio IPO delay, NBFC risks; strong ~14% EBITDA growth supports attractive risk-reward.
news.summary:
Jefferies reiterates Buy on Bharti Airtel with ₹2,250 TP despite revenue/EBITDA cut by 6–8%.
Concerns include Jio IPO delay, NBFC risks; strong ~14% EBITDA growth supports attractive risk-reward.

news.title:
CLSA retains Outperform for Bharti Airtel with ₹2,310 TP; ₹158bn call aids debt reduction.
₹478bn 9MFY26 FCF projected despite ~6% stake overhang from Singtel equalisation.
news.summary:
CLSA retains Outperform for Bharti Airtel with ₹2,310 TP; ₹158bn call aids debt reduction.
₹478bn 9MFY26 FCF projected despite ~6% stake overhang from Singtel equalisation.

news.title:
Alpha Wave Global to acquire Carlyle's stake in Bharti Airtel's data center unit.
Alpha Wave invests in transformative tech, holding stakes in OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI.
news.summary:
Alpha Wave Global to acquire Carlyle's stake in Bharti Airtel's data center unit.
Alpha Wave invests in transformative tech, holding stakes in OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel's NSE block trade involved ~777,686 shares at Rs. 1829.60.
The transaction totaled Rs. 142.29 crores.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel's NSE block trade involved ~777,686 shares at Rs. 1829.60.
The transaction totaled Rs. 142.29 crores.

news.title:
SC upholds Bharti Telecom's share capital reduction, dismissing minority shareholders' appeals.
The court stated share valuation is an expert exercise, with due legal process followed.
news.summary:
SC upholds Bharti Telecom's share capital reduction, dismissing minority shareholders' appeals.
The court stated share valuation is an expert exercise, with due legal process followed.

news.title: Airtel's Nxtra aims to raise $1B for expansion and infrastructure.
news.summary: Airtel's Nxtra aims to raise $1B for expansion and infrastructure.

news.title:
Zscaler and Bharti Airtel launch an AI Cyber Threat Research Center in India to enhance cybersecurity for critical sectors.
The partnership boosts Zscaler's AI-driven security efforts, aiding its competitive edge against rivals like Palo Alto Networks and CrowdStrike.
news.summary:
Zscaler and Bharti Airtel launch an AI Cyber Threat Research Center in India to enhance cybersecurity for critical sectors.
The partnership boosts Zscaler's AI-driven security efforts, aiding its competitive edge against rivals like Palo Alto Networks and CrowdStrike.

news.title:
Jio, Airtel, Vodafone Idea, BSNL oppose ISPs offering dedicated connectivity, citing competition concerns.
Telcos argue regulatory parity would be undermined by allowing ISPs to provide high-speed internet to enterprises.
news.summary:
Jio, Airtel, Vodafone Idea, BSNL oppose ISPs offering dedicated connectivity, citing competition concerns.
Telcos argue regulatory parity would be undermined by allowing ISPs to provide high-speed internet to enterprises.

news.title:
Telcos like Reliance Jio and Bharti Airtel clash with tech firms over DLCs pricing.
DLCs are secure broadband lines crucial for banks, data centers, enterprises.
news.summary:
Telcos like Reliance Jio and Bharti Airtel clash with tech firms over DLCs pricing.
DLCs are secure broadband lines crucial for banks, data centers, enterprises.
